NARRATOR.name: NARRATOR
NARRATOR.description: The ethereal voice that guides travelers through the Enchanted Realm.

SAGE.name: ELDER SAGE
SAGE.description: An ancient sage who holds the secrets of the realm.

storyDialogue.text: The mists part before you, revealing a land forgotten by time itself...
Ah, a traveler. It has been long since one crossed the Veil. Tell me, what brings you to the Enchanted Realm?
The sage's eyes glow with ancient wisdom. The forest around you hums with arcane energy.
This realm is not what it once was. Shadows creep at the edges of our world. You must choose wisely, traveler.
